chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2610 - وَ سَأَلَهُ إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ اَلْفَضْلِ : عَنِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ أَ يَلْبَسُ اَلثَّوْبَ قَدْ أَصَابَهُ اَلطِّيبُ فَقَالَ «إِذَا ذَهَبَ رِيحُ اَلطِّيبِ فَلْيَلْبَسْهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2610 - Isma'il ibn al-Fadl asked Imam (as) about whether a Muhrim can wear a garment that has been affected by perfume.
Imam (as) said: "If the scent of the perfume has disappeared, then he may wear it."
